Off Calendar Jul-09-2012 Continued To Aug-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for Catrina Christian. Carl Christian in Propria Persona.

Ms. Hinshaw stated that they had one long session of mediation, that the appraisal of the property came back at $105,000.00 and that she has not received the draft of the petition under the 13100 statute back from Catrina. Both Petitions for Letters of Administration were continued to August 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for Katrina Christian. Carl Christian in Propria Persona.

The Parties are in dispute. Both matters were continued to September 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Hinshaw to communicate with her Client.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien.
